name: Mobile Dev MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing mobile development tooling for AI agents — enabling agents to interact with iOS and Android development workflows, including simulator/emulator control, app deployment, device logs, cross-platform MAUI/.NET project management, and mobile-specific debugging capabilities.
use_cases: Controlling iOS simulators and Android emulators from mobile testing agents
Deploying and testing mobile apps from CI/CD automation agents
Reading device logs and crash reports from debugging agents
Managing .NET MAUI cross-platform project builds from development agents
not_for: Production app distribution (this is for development/testing workflows)
best_when: A .NET/MAUI mobile developer wants AI-assisted mobile development — particularly for cross-platform development with simulator management and device testing automation.
avoid_when: You do native Swift/Kotlin development and don't use cross-platform MAUI/.NET — use Xcode MCP or Android Studio tools instead.

auth.notes: No authentication — local development tool. Requires Xcode (for iOS) or Android SDK (for Android) installed locally.

pricing.notes: Free open source from jsuarezruiz. Requires mobile development SDKs (Xcode free, Android Studio free).

performance.rate_limits: Local — no rate limits; simulator launch times can be significant

known_agent_gotchas: iOS simulator requires macOS with Xcode — not available on Windows/Linux for iOS targets
Simulator startup times are slow — implement long timeouts for simulator boot operations
MAUI/.NET focus may limit pure Swift/Kotlin native development use cases
Mobile SDK versions must match project targets — verify SDK compatibility
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local mobile development tool. No external transmission. App installation on simulators is sandboxed. Physical device deployment requires developer signing certificates — handle with care.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local development tool. Simulators are sandboxed. Physical device deployment requires Apple/Google developer certificates — store securely.
